_provenance: schema-derived from shadow-logging-pattern plan §Deliverable 1 + 021_cvar_diagnostics column spec; field values are named constants representing the null-sentinel case (MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY) — not captured from a live run

_notes.row_dict: realistic cvar_diagnostics row with all seven caller-supplied columns populated; ts_utc is omitted because the migration DDL provides DEFAULT (datetime('now')) — callers never supply it
_notes.cvar_5pct: null sentinel — mirrors MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL path; sufficient-case tests must derive the cvar magnitude from the fixture, not assert a hardcoded float
_notes.cvar_n_tail: integer count of DISTINCT sub-5% tail observations; 0 here represents the insufficient sentinel case
_notes.cvar_5pct_long: second-window CVaR (§B.6 long window); null in insufficient case
_notes.cvar_n_tail_long: second-window tail count; null in insufficient case
_notes.mode_live: mode='live' is the production execution-path value; benchmarks use this to exercise the swallow path (non-blocking even on DB errors)
_notes.benchmark_intent: the fixture supplies the row shape; the benchmark itself asserts wall-clock latency — no fixture value is a timing assertion
